title: 'Let's debate it': ECB President tells Euronews as Spain pitches joint borrowing plan
content: European Central Bank President tells Euronews in an exclusive interview that it is "pretty obvious we need to have a European asset" that the markets see as safe and liquid, and one that can compete with the US.
